caption:
London’s newest installation is here at the stunning @libertylondon 🎈 Gorgeous balloons floating high as part of the Liberty Scarf Kiosk, which will be there until the end of March ❤️

📍Liberty London, Regent St., Carnaby, W1B 5AH
